_source: Feishu doc '表格字段规则' (wiki OwwywNuXcifxJ4k9XBbcod8Bnnc / bitable block ldxfcqD0XQNtTRZS / docx PLIBdN5Wto4aWHxnMBQcOKBDnWg). This is the AUTHORITATIVE rule source for field filling — it OVERRIDES any Keepa/web-derived value. Match entries to template fields by `label` (Data Definitions Local Label) or `attr` (attribute substring). Synced with '增加规则（0720测试后更新）'.

fixed_defaults.label: Skip Offer
fixed_defaults.note: child/single rows only; parent overrides to Yes (see parent_offer_clear)

fixed_defaults.label: Product Id Type
fixed_defaults.note: multi-variant: fill on CHILD rows only; parent leaves Product Id Type / Product Id blank

blank_rules._note: In ALL categories, regardless of whether the product actually has batteries, treat as 'no battery': leave every battery-related field blank. Exception: 'Are batteries required?' is set to 'No' (see fixed_defaults). Applies to base attribute names containing: battery, lithium, number_of_lithium, cell_composition, un_number, hazmat (battery aspect).

sku.pattern: 3 groups of uppercase alphanumeric, each 2-4 chars, joined by '-'. Unique across the batch.

product_id_upc.uniqueness: web-search the generated UPC; only use it if there are NO results, else regenerate.
product_id_upc.brand_not_in_table: do NOT generate a UPC; leave Product Id blank and HIGHLIGHT the row in the output/report.
product_id_upc.check_digit_note: The doc says 'last 6 random'. A valid UPC-A requires a check digit, so the generator uses prefix(6)+random(5)+computed check digit(1). Confirm if you'd rather keep 6 fully-random digits.

generation_rules.ram_memory_maximum_size: computer categories, multi-variant: fill using the child with the largest value's unit
generation_rules._see_also: Per-field fill/normalize/clear rules live in autofill_rules; category-scoped inferable fallbacks in inferable_rules. Model Year and Special Features are defined there (single source of truth), not duplicated here.

parent_row: Variation Theme Name = same as all children
Item Name = product family name (no config attributes)
no price / inventory / shipping / fulfillment (see parent_offer_clear)
no UPC/EAN/GTIN (Product Id + Product Id Type blank)
child_row: Variation Theme Name = identical to parent
each sellable child has its own Product Id (or explicit GTIN Exempt)
children fill price, inventory, images, compliance info
every attribute in the variation theme must be fully filled per child

parent_offer_clear._note: 0720: Parent row auto-clears fulfillment/price/quantity/inventory; keep only variant-relationship fields + Skip Offer=Yes.

dimension_weight_guess._note: 0720 [全类目]: when purchase/reference info lacks item or package size/weight, search similar products and GUESS-FILL. These fields are REQUIRED; guessing is explicitly allowed.

inferable_rules.label: Total USB 2.0 Ports
inferable_rules.rule: Count USB 2.0 ports from web/PDF port lists; if not found, fill 0. (fallback auto-applied by compose when empty)

inferable_rules.label: Total USB 3.0 Ports
inferable_rules.rule: Count USB 3.x / USB-C / USB-A 3.x from port lists; if not found, fill 1. (fallback auto-applied by compose when empty)

inferable_rules.label: Total USB Ports
inferable_rules.rule: Total USB ports = Total USB 2.0 + Total USB 3.0 (derived when empty).

inferable_rules.label: RAM Memory Technology
inferable_rules.rule: Extract DDR4/DDR5/LPDDR from descriptions and normalize to an accepted value.

inferable_rules.label: CPU Base Speed
inferable_rules.rule: Derive base clock from CPU specs.

inferable_rules.label: Solid State Storage Drive Interface
inferable_rules.rule: Extract from descriptions like 'PCIe NVMe M.2 SSD'.

inferable_rules.label: Solid State Storage Drive Form Factor
Total USB 2.0 Ports
inferable_rules.rule: Count USB 2.0 ports from web/PDF port lists; if not found, fill 0. (fallback auto-applied by compose when empty)

inferable_rules.label: Total USB 3.0 Ports
inferable_rules.rule: Count USB 3.x / USB-C / USB-A 3.x from port lists; if not found, fill 1. (fallback auto-applied by compose when empty)

inferable_rules.label: Total USB Ports
inferable_rules.rule: Total USB ports = Total USB 2.0 + Total USB 3.0 (derived when empty).

inferable_rules.label: Speaker Maximum Output Power
inferable_rules.rule: If purchase info has max power, extract the number; otherwise leave blank.

_autofill_rules_note: Each rule has category ('*' = all), label (template Local Label), and a human-readable rule. Rules with an `action` object are applied deterministically by compose_listing.apply_autofill_rules (which reads BOTH autofill_rules and inferable_rules); rules WITHOUT an action are agent-owned (need product judgment or generation — see SKILL.md checklist). Every action fills only when the target cell(s) are empty, so operator/web values always win. action.type: normalize (map current value X->Y); default_when_empty (spread `values` across the label's repeated cells only if all currently empty; marked inferred); clear_when_global (clear this label's cells when Target Region == Global); infer_default (fill the label's first cell with `value` when empty — optional `unit`/`unit_label` fills the sibling unit column, optional `when` {label, contains|equals|empty|not_empty} gates on another field's current value); sum_labels (fill the label with the numeric sum of `labels` when empty and every source is numeric — runs after infer_default). Global unit backfill is handled separately via single-option unit columns.

autofill_rules.label: Wireless Communication Standard
autofill_rules.rule: Rewrite 802.11be to the template-accepted form 802.11.be.

autofill_rules.label: Hard Disk Rotational Speed
autofill_rules.rule: For SSD write 0; unit field = RPM. Auto-applied when Hard Disk Description contains 'SSD'.

autofill_rules.label: Hard Disk Rotational Speed
autofill_rules.rule: For SSD write 0; unit field = RPM. Auto-applied when Hard Disk Description contains 'SSD'.

autofill_rules.label: CPU Socket
autofill_rules.rule: AIO/mobile platforms default to BGA; if not accepted, use Integrated. (agent: requires platform judgment)

autofill_rules.label: Specific Uses for Product
autofill_rules.rule: Default three cells: Business / Personal / Everyday Use.

autofill_rules.label: Included Components
autofill_rules.rule: Default four cells: Computer / Keyboard & Mouse / Power Adapter / User Manual.

autofill_rules.label: Human Interface Input
autofill_rules.rule: Touch models → Touchscreen; AIO bundles also add Keyboard / Mouse. (agent: requires touch/AIO judgment)

autofill_rules.label: Graphics Ram Size
autofill_rules.rule: Integrated graphics → value 0, unit GB. Auto-applied when no discrete GPU (Graphics Coprocessor empty).

autofill_rules.label: Graphics Card Interface
autofill_rules.rule: Integrated graphics → Integrated. Auto-applied when no discrete GPU (Graphics Coprocessor empty).

autofill_rules.label: Graphics Ram
autofill_rules.rule: Integrated graphics → Shared. Auto-applied when no discrete GPU (Graphics Coprocessor empty).

autofill_rules.label: Compliance - Notebook Computer Type
autofill_rules.rule: When Target Region is Global / ships_globally, clear this field.

autofill_rules.label: Compliance - Included Components
autofill_rules.rule: When Target Region is Global / ships_globally, clear this field.

autofill_rules.label: Graphics Card Interface
autofill_rules.rule: Integrated graphics → Integrated. Auto-applied when no discrete GPU (Graphics Coprocessor empty).

autofill_rules.label: Graphics Ram
autofill_rules.rule: Integrated graphics → Shared. Auto-applied when no discrete GPU (Graphics Coprocessor empty).

autofill_rules.label: Graphics Ram Size
autofill_rules.rule: Integrated graphics → value 0, unit GB. Auto-applied when no discrete GPU (Graphics Coprocessor empty).

autofill_rules.label: Included Components
autofill_rules.rule: Default four cells: Laptop / AC Adapter / Power Cable / User Manual.

autofill_rules.label: Specific Uses for Product
autofill_rules.rule: Default three cells: Business / Personal / Everyday Use.

autofill_rules.label: Model Year
autofill_rules.rule: If source material has no year, write the current calendar year. (agent: only when source lacks a year)

autofill_rules.label: Speaker Maximum Output Power Unit
autofill_rules.rule: Child rows default to Watts. (agent: only when the power value is present)

autofill_rules.label: parent fulfillment/price/quantity/inventory
autofill_rules.rule: Parent row: clear those offer fields; keep variant-relationship fields; Skip Offer = Yes. (handled by parent_offer_clear)

autofill_rules.label: numeric value with empty unit
autofill_rules.rule: Auto-fill matching unit when value is present but unit is empty. Known units: MHz, GHz, RPM, GB, TB, Inches, Pounds, Watts. (deterministic subset: applied automatically when the unit column has exactly one allowed value)

autofill_rules.label: Special Features
autofill_rules.rule: Generate 5 product-relevant feature phrases into the 5 Special Features cells. (agent: generation)
